_comment: ConEd SC1 residential rates. Edit + redeploy to update the tool with no code change. app.js fetches this and overrides the defaults baked into calc.js. Cents are expressed as $/kWh; demand rates are $/kW.

meta.asOf: Standard/TOU: 2025 published SC1 NYC averages. TOU & demand rates: current as of 2026-07.
